creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
In message <4D29DCA6.9030405@gmx.de>, olli hauer writes:
> On 2011-01-09 08:08, Cy Schubert wrote:
> > Unable to reproduce the problem locally.
> > 
> > The posted patch does not address the problem
> > 
> 
> Sorry, yes WRKDIRPREFIX is also working for me.
> Don't know why but I read only PREFIX instead of WRKDIRPREFIX.
> 
> Maybe the submitter can show us the output of
> # make -V WRKDIRPREFIX
> inside the screen port directory.
> 
> The patch I submitted allows builds with a custom PREFIX, so
> tools like ports-mgmt/genplist can work with this port.

This is a different issue and can be addressed separately once this PR has 
been resolved.


-- 
Cheers,
